title: rosa gallica var. subinermis
intro: Rosa gallica var. subinermis, also known as the French rose, is a fragrant, deciduous shrub that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Rosa gallica var. subinermis has been associated with various health benefits, such as reducing anxiety and improving sleep quality due to its sedative properties. The plant is often used in herbal preparations like teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its potential benefits.
